title: Manufacturing Engineer - Su-Kam Power Systems - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Su-Kam Power Systems - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? Su-Kam Power Systems in Pune offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Su-Kam Power Systems:
Su-Kam Power Systems is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Su-Kam Power Systems!
